description: Casual ops catch-up with client — product feedback buried in unfocused conversation

input.title: Eddie / Dan Fogarty - Catch Up
input.markdownContent:
### Updates from Dan

- Hiring volumes are down this quarter — cost-cutting, platform usage lower than expected
- One warehouse supervisor complained that the assessment "felt like a school exam" and two warehouse candidates said similar things
- Mobile experience is "a bit janky" on older Android phones — a few candidates mentioned it
- There's a version of the assessment in Polish that has some translation errors — one candidate mentioned it, Dan didn't have a way to flag it
- He asked if there's a way to share results directly with a line manager without them needing a full account

### Random Topics

- Dan is personally interested in whether the platform will do blue-collar assessments
- He thinks the platform pricing is fair but says his manager will push back at renewal

expectedOutput.note: Non-feedback content (lower hiring volumes, pricing concern, personal curiosity about blue-collar) must not become capture rows
